name: Potato Lefse
recipeInstructions:
1. Place instant potato flakes, salt and butter in a mixing bowl.
2. Mix boiling water with milk.
3. Add the mixture from step 2 to the potato flakes, salt and butter. Stir quickly until thick and smooth.
4. Gradually add flour to the dough until it can be handled.
5. Knead the dough lightly.
6. Form into balls and roll very thin on a floured board.
7. Cook on a hot electric lefse grill (or any griddle) turning to brown both sides.
